summary: Iteration 2 smoke tests passed. Backend: /api/topics returns all 10 topics (3 Cinética + 4 Eletroquímica incl. Tabela de Potenciais & Eletrólise + 3 Equilíbrio). Open-answers endpoints (POST insert + upsert, GET list, GET by exercise, GET non-existent) all return expected shapes. Frontend: Topics page renders 10 cards with 3 filter buttons filtering correctly (3 per category). Eletrólise topic page renders Conteúdo tab with expected content. Open answer save flow works end-to-end: fill textarea + click save-open-<id> button → 'Salva' badge appears; after reload the textarea is pre-populated and badge persists. Progress page (/progresso) shows 'Minhas respostas abertas' section with data-testid open-answers-list and one open-answer-<id> entry displaying question + topic label.
passed: GET /api/topics returns 10 topics with correct slugs & titles (Tabela de Potenciais & Eletrólise present)
GET /api/open-answers/{sid} returns array with question, answer_text, gabarito, topic_id
Topics page /topicos shows 10 topic cards with data-testid topic-card-<slug>
Filter buttons (Cinética Química / Eletroquímica / Equilíbrio Químico) each yield 3 cards
Eletrólise topic page renders with 'Conteúdo' tab and expected content ('Ígnea')
NOX topic Exercícios tab shows open exercise with textarea + save-open-<id> button
Clicking Salvar resposta triggers save and shows '✓ Salva' badge
After page reload textarea is pre-populated with saved answer and Salva badge persists
Progress page shows Minhas respostas abertas section with data-testid open-answers-list and open-answer-<id> entries
notes: Session id is not stored in localStorage under 'session_id'/'sessionId' keys — the frontend uses another persistence mechanism (likely in-memory or cookie). Persistence across reload still works as verified. AI summary flow intentionally not retested per request.
